name: §6Crow
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Intelligence: §b150
§7Ability Damage: §c[Ability Damage]

§6Quick Hands
§7Lowers the cooldown of your
§7abilities by §a15%§7.

§6Camouflage
§7After casting an ability, increase
§7your §a❈ Defense §7by §a20% §7for §b20
§bseconds§7.
§8Capped at 500 Defense

§6Insightful
§7Gives a §a15% §7chance to not consume
§7Mana when using an ability.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Snow Crow Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to §aCrow
§7pets.

§aThis skin will allow you to swap
§abetween 15 chilly crows!

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!

§d§lMYTHIC COSMETIC
